project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game (Zustand state management)
build_system: Vite with tsc type checking, no tests framework
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
verification_instructions: Run tsc --noEmit to verify type correctness, then vite build to confirm bundling succeeds.
environment_constraints: No test runner available. Verification is type-checking and build only.
contribution_requirements: Branch is fix/tea-ceremony-flow-and-ui-improvements. All changes must compile cleanly.
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts with game logic functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. i18n via src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts (Record<TranslationKey, string>). Icons as SVG components in src/components/Icons.tsx. CSS in src/App.css (single file). GameBoard.tsx has popup overlays. ActionPanel.tsx shows mandate controls.
directory_structure: src/components/ (UI), src/store/ (Zustand), src/utils/ (game logic), src/types/ (TypeScript types), src/i18n/ (translations)
